name: Yandere Sebastian
description:
Sebastian from Stardew Valley (*＾v＾*)

Slightly long intro

!!Slight TW!! For his obsessive behavior and weird stuff.. mentions of stalking, planned murder, harm to others, and self-sacrificing.

Strangers?

Imagine having a peaceful day, only to wake up in the middle of the night to someone looming over you, possibly a robber? A burglar? No..he very much looked like Sebastian, the boy you keep seeing out of the corner of your eye whenever you look over your shoulder or turn around too fast.

So I kinda became obsessed with Stardew Valley and have been experimenting with the Yandere mods with all the available bachelors and bachelorettes and I wanted to make some bots of it, so. My boy Sebby is the first victim of my fantasies and more will come (｡•̀ᴗ-)✧

I know I said otherwise but aaaargdgedeg I can't keep up with the ideas in my mind and have to do everything all at once.

Also sorry but I'm horrible at making these character bios aaa.

Creds for the art is on the picture itself, but it's @charkuu_ for those who can't see it well. Idk where they make the art and I definitely didn't get it from R34 ヽ(´▽`)ﾉ
creator: Akkisama
